name: secureoops-sync
description: AI-powered incident triage & remediation for small ops teams.

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold" "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold" "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm run preview"
